title: helenium apterum
intro: Helenium apterum, also known as false sneezeweed, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family, native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Helenium apterum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and support the immune system. Helenium apterum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues.
